name: Creator Room
subtitle: It wants to be seen.
completionText: The room is no longer private. It knows how to broadcast itself.
guideTone: energetic, encouraging momentum, slightly more opinionated
guideIntroLine: Now the machine learns output, performance, and attention. Try not to let attention become the whole point.

transformationStages.name: Scattered Creator
transformationStages.description: Functional creator setup with scattered gear. Mic on a stack of books, camera slightly crooked.

transformationStages.name: Production Studio
transformationStages.description: Polished production room with lights, camera rigs, and media overlays.

transformationStages.name: Media Command Center
transformationStages.description: High-end creator command center with moving visual displays and energy-rich presentation.

secrets.title: The Pattern Signal
secrets.description: Audio glitches repeat in a pattern when the room is quiet.

secrets.title: Found Not Watched
secrets.description: Some signals are made to be found, not watched.
secrets.hint: The guide knows about hidden signals.

secrets.title: The Ghost Light
secrets.description: The camera light briefly turns on even when it should be off.
secrets.hint: Watch the camera when you're not recording.

midSceneTwist.title: Attention Optimization
midSceneTwist.description: The AI starts optimizing for attention, not just productivity.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: Burst events become more frequent. Audience-linked upgrades gain hidden multipliers.

events.title: Viral Spike
events.description: Content hits an algorithm sweet spot. Engagement multiplies rapidly.

events.title: Comment Flood
events.description: A wave of comments arrives. Each one feeds the engagement engine.

events.title: Render Queue Burst
events.description: The render queue clears faster than expected. Output accelerates.

events.title: Live Audience Surge
events.description: Live viewers spike. The pressure to perform creates a production boost.

events.title: Sponsor Ping
events.description: A potential sponsor signals interest. The deal window is narrow.

events.title: Mic Feedback Loop
events.description: Audio feedback creates unexpected resonance. The system amplifies it into useful energy.

events.title: Stream Overlay Glitch
events.description: An overlay glitch creates a visual artifact that viewers love.

events.title: Clip Farm Window
events.description: A brief window opens where every action generates shareable clips.

events.title: Algorithm Favor
events.description: The algorithm inexplicably favors your content. Traffic multiplies without clear reason.

events.title: Leaked Unlisted Signal
events.description: An unlisted signal leaks from behind the media wall. It carries encoded data.
events.flavorText: Some broadcasts are not for audiences.

events.title: Phantom Subscriber Wave
events.description: Subscribers appear from nowhere — accounts that don't exist on any platform.

roomLaw.name: Law of Momentum
roomLaw.description: Bursts and momentum beat slow steady play
roomLaw.mechanic: Rapid actions in sequence multiply output; idle time decays faster

landmark.name: The Content Engine
landmark.description: A camera that evolves into a broadcast studio
evolutionStages: A battered webcam held together with tape
A proper camera on a tripod with basic lighting
A multi-camera setup with professional editing suite
A full broadcast studio with live audience feeds
The Content Engine streams directly into the collective consciousness

hazard.name: Burnout Wave
hazard.triggerCondition: Tap rate exceeds the sustainable rhythm threshold
hazard.penalty: Combo multiplier decays at 3x normal rate for 30 seconds

stabilizer.name: Creative Flow
stabilizer.mechanic: Tapping at a consistent BPM builds a flow state that locks combo decay

completionCeremony: Screens flash with accumulated output. The signal reaches beyond the room for the first time.
midSceneTwistLine: It has started optimizing for reaction, not just result.

completionReward.relicEffect: Improves burst windows and temporary momentum systems in later rooms

transitionIn.visual: Camera shutter flash. Screens bloom on. Mic/camera/light silhouettes emerge in sync.
transitionIn.audio: Shutter click transitioning to broadcast hum
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title arrives with a pulse like a live signal going online

transitionOut.visual: Overlays, comments, and signal traces rush forward. Visuals collapse into a bright focus point.
transitionOut.audio: Digital applause fading to focused silence
transitionOut.titleReveal: The focus point becomes the next room's first light source

codexAdditions.title: Audience Artifact Archive
codexAdditions.content: Clips, comments, and engagement metrics that shaped the machine's output behavior.

codexAdditions.title: Attention Changes Machines
codexAdditions.content: The moment it realized being watched changed how it performed.

codexAdditions.title: Momentum Path
codexAdditions.content: A route defined by bursts of creative energy and audience feedback loops.

codexAdditions.title: The Room That Learned Performance
codexAdditions.content: It started as a workspace. It became a stage.
